headline: Software stocks are finally joining the tech rally
summary: The iShares Expanded Tech-Software Sector ETF is set for its best two-day run since last April, led by heavyweights including Microsoft, Oracle, Palantir, Salesforce, and Palo Alto Networks.

headline: Datadog’s Price Target Trimmed by Mizuho: Can This AI Monitoring Leader Deliver in Q1?
summary: Datadog (NASDAQ:DDOG) stock is heading into its May 7 Q1 2026 earnings report with a freshly trimmed price target from Mizuho. Analyst Gregg Moskowitz lowered his target to $145 from $170 while keeping an Outperform rating on the shares, part of a broader Q1 preview sweep across large-cap software names. The cut doesn’t signal a ... Datadog’s Price Target Trimmed by Mizuho: Can This AI Monitoring Leader Deliver in Q1?

headline: Mizuho Maintains Outperform on Datadog, Lowers Price Target to $145
summary: Mizuho  analyst Gregg Moskowitz   maintains Datadog (NASDAQ:DDOG) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $170 to $145.
